intended_use: Neuro Insight V1.0 is an image processing solution. It is intended to assist appropriately trained medical professionals in their analysis workflow on neurological MRI images.
intended_use_full: Neuro Insight V1.0 is an image processing solution. It is intended to assist appropriately trained medical professionals in their analysis workflow on neurological MRI images.
target_condition: neurological conditions evaluated on MRI (stroke, perfusion disorders, diffusion abnormalities)
ground_truth: Expert clinician manual brain segmentation annotated following criteria defined by US board-certified neuroradiologist; visual assessment by three US board-certified neuroradiologists for parametric maps and co-registrations
other_metrics: DICE coefficient for brain extraction algorithm: average 0.97 (range 0.907 to 0.988); all 6 co-registrations (FLAIR-DWI, FLAIR-DSC, FLAIR-T1, FLAIR-T1g, FLAIR-T2, FLAIR-follow-up FLAIR) rated as acceptable for reading and interpretation by three US board-certified neuroradiologists
